name: appstoreconnect-mcp
description: Local MCP tools for the App Store Connect API.

interface.shortDescription: Use App Store Connect API tools in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local stdio MCP server for authenticated App Store Connect API workflows. Credentials are read from environment variables.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the App Store Connect MCP tools to inspect apps, builds, versions, and API resources.
